mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, INBOUND_QUANTITY, INBOUND_STATUS, EXPECTED_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, REMARKS, DELETED_YN ) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{mtrlCd}, #{mtrlNm}, #{tblMtrlMId}, #{inboundQuantity}, #{inboundStatus}, #{expectedDate}, GETDATE(), #{saveUser}, GETDATE(), #{updtUser}, #{remarks}, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT SET ACTUAL_QUANTITY = #{actualQuantity}, ACTUAL_DATE = #{actualDate}, INBOUND_STATUS = 'COMPLETED', COMPLETE_TIME = GETDATE(), COMPLETE_USER = #{completeUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{updtUser} WHERE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId}

UPDATE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT SET INBOUND_QUANTITY = #{inboundQuantity}, EXPECTED_DATE = #{expectedDate}, REMARKS = #{remarks}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{updtUser} WHERE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId}
mapper.select: SELECT ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID as tblInboundProductId, ip.CMPY_CD as cmpyCd, ip.AGNT_CD as agntCd, ip.MTRL_CD as mtrlCd, ip.MTRL_NM as mtrlNm, ip.INBOUND_QUANTITY as inboundQuantity, ip.INBOUND_STATUS as inboundStatus, ip.EXPECTED_DATE as expectedDate, ip.SAVE_TIME as saveTime, ip.SAVE_USER as saveUser FROM TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ip WHERE (ip.DELETED_YN IS NULL OR ip.DELETED_YN = 'N') AND ip.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND ip.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND ip.MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND ip.EXPECTED_DATE = #{expectedDate} AND ip.INBOUND_STATUS = 'PENDING'
mapper.update:
-- 입고 상태를 PENDING으로 되돌리기 UPDATE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT SET INBOUND_STATUS = 'PENDING', ACTUAL_QUANTITY = NULL, ACTUAL_DATE = NULL, COMPLETE_TIME = NULL, COMPLETE_USER = NULL, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{updtUser} WHERE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId} AND INBOUND_STATUS = 'COMPLETED'
-- TBL_MTRL_M의 CURRENT_QUANTITY에서 입고 수량 차감 (MTO가 아닌 상품만) UPDATE TBL_MTRL_M SET CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) - #{actualQuantity}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{updtUser} WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N' -- MTO가 아닌 상품만 재고 관리
-- 재고 변동 이력 기록 (입고 취소) INSERT INTO TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN ) SELECT #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, (SELECT AGNT_NM FROM TBL_AGENCY_M WHERE AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}), TBL_MTRL_M_ID, #{mtrlCd}, #{mtrlNm}, 'INBOUND_CANCEL', ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + #{actualQuantity}, -#{actualQuantity}, ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0), '입고취소-자동차감', CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()), GETDATE(), #{updtUser}, GETDATE(), #{updtUser}, 'N' FROM TBL_MTRL_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'
